task: This workflow doesn’t set explicit permissions for the GITHUB_TOKEN, so it may inherit broader default permissions than needed. Since the new notify-slack job only needs to read run metadata and send a webhook, consider setting minimal permissions (e.g., contents: read) at the workflow or job level to reduce blast radius if a step/action is compromised.

task: The Slack action is referenced by a version tag (slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.1.1). For supply-chain hardening, consider pinning third-party GitHub Actions to a full commit SHA (and optionally documenting the intended release/tag) so an upstream retag can’t change what runs in CI.
